name: Teriyaki Tempeh & Pineapple Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tamari, mirin, pineapple juice, grated ginger, minced garlic, and red pepper flakes in a small saucepan.
2. Heat over medium heat until the mixture begins to simmer gently.
3. Add 1 tempeh burger to the pan and cook for about 5 minutes on each side until nicely browned.
4. Repeat with remaining burgers, cooking them one at a time.
5. Once all burgers are cooked, set aside and let the sauce reduce slightly.
